deepCandidates.reason: The remote heads equal the already audited pins. ItemClasses work, Mods and BaseItemTypes fail on the current table layout, and stat_translations unconditionally requests the Trade API before local CSD traversal.

The pinned ooz artifact extracts current DATC64 and CSD files locally and deterministically. DatView is GUI-driven, has no audited unattended German/English export contract, and its product export scripts do not prove lossless preservation of all required structures.

The documented aggregate extraction entry point is absent at the pinned commit; the available DATC64 parser requires a supplied schema, and the repository documents stale fixed-row assumptions and optional runtime bundle downloads.

searchedButExcluded.reason: GUI-only workflow with CDN fallback and automatic schema-update capability; no pinned unattended offline batch contract for the requested comparison.
Schema definitions are not an extraction and localization stack by themselves.
Archived predecessor; no reason to prefer it over the maintained explorer.

recommendation: A limited, separately authorized parser adaptation is required; none of the audited stacks is sufficient for a new pin and approval decision.
